title: The Big Cheese Advanced Pest Repeller Plug-In, Humane, Ultrasonic and Electromagnetic Rodent Pest Deterrent for the Home, Safe for Use Around Cats and Dogs
features: WELFARE-FRIENDLY: Plug-in sonic rodent deterrent combines ultrasound and electromagnetic action to humanely repel rats and mice
CONTROL: Recommended for use once infestations in the home are under control
PROTECTION: Ultrasound, electromagnetic deterrent unit protects areas in the home of up to 37m², with halo-red LED and TEST-button features to enable quick checks in-situ
DUAL-ACTION: Combines ultrasound waves and electromagnetic action to pulse through household wiring to reach rodent nest sites within walls, ceilings and wall cavities in the home
SAFE: Suitable to use around children and pets such as cats and dogs
WHERE TO USE: Plugs directly into power sockets, can be used in garages, lofts, outbuildings, sheds and in the home, does not adversely affect electrical wiring or interfere with domestic appliances

Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. The ideal repellent for hard-to-reach areas without mains power, providing continuous ultrasonic protection for up to three months. This rat trap kit effectively controls rodent infestations indoors and out. The kit is lockable and tamper-resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. Compact, tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid to help protect children and pets from contact with bait (not included). Designed for use with all types of bait. Fresh 'n Tasty trap bait paste from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps. Re-bait up to 60 traps.
